$description: Component tokens for Mobile List Item component with multiple leading content options (None, Avatar, Featured Icon, Icon, Image), trailing content variants (Default, Dual Actions, Single Action, Input Stepper, Toggle iOS/Android, Checkbox, Radio, Chevron, Icon, Value, Tag, Tag+Icon, Avatar group, Avatar + Icon, Tag + icon, Avatar group + Tag, Tag group), and subtext options (None, 1 Line, 2 Lines). Supports flexible layouts for displaying list items with various content combinations. Figma Reference: Node ID 126-26679

$component.name: List Item
$component.description: A mobile list item component that displays content in a structured list format. Supports multiple leading content types (avatar, icons, images, or none), flexible trailing content (actions, controls, indicators, or none), and optional subtext (none, single line, or two lines). Used for displaying structured data in mobile lists, menus, and navigation.
$component.structure: Container with background, padding, and gap. Contains leading content section (optional avatar/icon/image), main content section (text with optional tag and optional icon), optional subtext section (1 or 2 lines), trailing content section (various action/control types), and optional divider at bottom.

sizes.no-subtext: 33px-50px height - List item without subtext, height varies based on leading/trailing content
sizes.1-line-subtext: 50px-61px height - List item with single line subtext, height varies based on leading/trailing content
sizes.2-line-subtext: 67px height - List item with two line subtext, consistent height

leading-content.none: No leading content, text starts at left edge

trailing-content.default: No trailing content, text extends to right edge
trailing-content.dual-actions: Two action buttons in trailing section
trailing-content.single-action: Single action button in trailing section
trailing-content.input-stepper: Input stepper control in trailing section
trailing-content.toggle-ios: iOS-style toggle switch in trailing section
trailing-content.toggle-android: Android-style toggle switch in trailing section
trailing-content.radio: Radio button control in trailing section
trailing-content.tag-icon: Tag with icon in trailing section
trailing-content.avatar-icon: Avatar with icon in trailing section
trailing-content.tag-icon-alt: Tag with icon (alternative) in trailing section
trailing-content.avatar-group-tag: Avatar group with tag in trailing section

subtext.1-line: Single line subtext below main text
subtext.2-lines: Two lines of subtext below main text

usage.contexts: Mobile lists, menus, navigation items, settings screens, data displays, user profiles, content lists, selection lists
usage.features: Flexible leading content (avatar/icon/image/none), Multiple trailing content options (actions/controls/indicators), Optional subtext (none/1-line/2-lines), Divider separator, Flexible layouts, Various interaction patterns
